all.en: The human resources department is pleased to announce updates to the annual performance bonus policy.
all.zh: 人力資源部很高興宣布年度績效獎金辦法的更新內容。

all.en: These changes will take effect for the bonus cycle beginning January first next year.
all.zh: 本次調整將自明年一月一日起的獎金週期開始生效。

all.en: The revised policy was developed based on extensive employee feedback and market benchmarking.
all.zh: 修訂後的辦法是依據廣泛的員工回饋與市場標竿研究所制定。

all.en: Our primary goal is to make the bonus structure more transparent, fair, and motivating.
all.zh: 我們的主要目標是使獎金結構更透明、更公平且更具激勵性。

all.en: Under the new framework, performance bonuses will consist of three distinct components.
all.zh: 在新架構下，績效獎金將由三個明確的部分組成。

all.en: The first component is tied directly to overall company financial performance.
all.zh: 第一部分直接連結公司整體財務表現。

all.en: The second component reflects departmental achievement of key business objectives.
all.zh: 第二部分反映各部門對重要業務目標的達成度。

all.en: The third component recognizes individual contribution and demonstrated competencies.
all.zh: 第三部分則表彰個人貢獻以及展現的職能。

all.en: Each component is weighted differently depending on the employee level and role.
all.zh: 各部分的權重會依員工層級與職務不同而有所差異。

all.en: Senior leaders will see a stronger emphasis on company-wide and departmental results.
all.zh: 資深主管的部分將更強調公司整體與部門的成果。

all.en: Individual contributors will see a stronger emphasis on personal achievement metrics.
all.zh: 個人貢獻者的部分將更強調個人成就指標。

all.en: Eligibility requires at least six months of continuous service before the year-end cutoff.
all.zh: 獲取資格的條件為在年度結算日前持續任職至少六個月。

all.en: Employees on extended leave during the cycle may receive a pro-rated bonus payment.
all.zh: 於週期內請長假的員工可能會按比例領取獎金。

all.en: Performance ratings will continue to follow our existing five-tier evaluation scale.
all.zh: 績效評等將沿用現行的五級評鑑制度。

all.en: Calibration sessions among managers help ensure consistency across teams and locations.
all.zh: 主管之間的校準會議有助於確保跨團隊與跨地點的一致性。

all.en: Bonus communications will be delivered individually during private review meetings.
all.zh: 獎金通知將於個別的私下檢討會議中傳達。

all.en: Payment will be processed in the February payroll following the annual review cycle.
all.zh: 獎金將於年度檢討週期後的二月薪資中發放。

all.en: Tax withholdings and other deductions will be applied according to local regulations.
all.zh: 稅務扣繳及其他扣除項目將依當地法規辦理。

all.en: A detailed frequently asked questions document is now available on the human resources page.
all.zh: 詳細的常見問題文件現已上傳至人力資源網頁。

all.en: The document includes worked examples for several common employee scenarios.
all.zh: 該文件提供多個常見員工情境的試算範例。

all.en: Information sessions will be held on April second, April ninth, and April sixteenth.
all.zh: 說明會將於四月二日、四月九日與四月十六日舉行。

all.en: Each session lasts one hour and includes time for live questions from attendees.
all.zh: 每場說明會為時一小時，並包含與會者現場提問時間。

all.en: If you cannot attend in person, recordings will be posted on the learning portal.
all.zh: 若無法親自出席，課程錄影將上傳至學習入口網站。

all.en: We thank you for your hard work and look forward to recognizing your achievements.
all.zh: 感謝您的辛勤付出，我們期待表彰您的成就。

all.en: Employees who feel their performance evaluation does not accurately reflect their contributions may file a formal appeal.
all.zh: 若員工認為績效評估未能準確反映其貢獻，可提出正式申訴。

all.en: Appeals must be submitted in writing to the human resources business partner within fourteen days of receiving the rating.
all.zh: 申訴須於收到評等後十四天內，以書面方式向人資業務夥伴提出。

all.en: An appeal committee composed of three senior leaders will review each case and provide a written response.
all.zh: 申訴委員會由三位資深主管組成，將審查每件申訴並提供書面回覆。

all.en: Confidentiality is strictly maintained throughout the entire appeals process to protect all parties involved.
all.zh: 整個申訴流程嚴格遵守保密原則，以保障所有相關人員。

all.en: The updated policy also introduces a special recognition bonus for exceptional contributions outside of standard performance metrics.
all.zh: 新版辦法另引入特別表揚獎金，以肯定超越標準績效指標的卓越貢獻。

all.en: Nominations for the special recognition bonus may be submitted by any colleague or manager at any time during the year.
all.zh: 特別表揚獎金的提名可由任何同事或主管於全年任何時間提出。

all.en: All bonus calculations will be reviewed by an independent auditor to ensure complete fairness and accuracy.
all.zh: 所有獎金計算將由獨立稽核人員審查，以確保完全公平且精確。

all.en: Additional details regarding international employees and currency conversions are available in the supplementary policy guide.
all.zh: 有關國際員工與匯率換算的詳細資訊，可參閱補充政策指南。

all.en: Managers are encouraged to discuss the new policy openly with their teams to ensure broad understanding and alignment.
all.zh: 鼓勵主管與團隊公開討論新辦法，以確保普遍理解並達成共識。

all.en: We remain committed to fostering a culture in which every employee feels valued, motivated, and fairly rewarded.
all.zh: 我們將持續致力於營造讓每位員工感到受重視、有動力且獲得公平回饋的企業文化。

all.en: Long-service awards will continue to be granted in addition to the new bonus framework, honoring employees who reach significant tenure milestones.
all.zh: 在新獎金架構之外，年資獎仍將持續頒發，表彰達成重要服務年資里程碑的員工。

all.en: Equity awards for senior leaders will be governed by a separate document published by the board compensation committee in May.
all.zh: 資深主管的股權獎酬將由董事會薪酬委員會於五月另行公布的文件規範。

all.en: Employees on parental leave during the cycle will continue to be evaluated using the same standards as their peers in active status.
all.zh: 週期內請育嬰假的員工將與在職同儕適用相同的評估標準。

all.en: Bonus communications will reference both quantitative achievements and qualitative behavioral evidence collected throughout the year.
all.zh: 獎金通知將同時參考全年蒐集到的量化成就與質化行為佐證。

all.en: A new dashboard available on the people analytics portal will allow employees to monitor their progress against published bonus criteria.
all.zh: 員工可透過人力分析入口網站上的新儀表板，監看自身對既定獎金標準的達成進度。

all.en: Managers will receive specialized training on delivering bonus feedback in a constructive, transparent, and respectful manner.
all.zh: 主管將接受專業訓練，學習以建設性、透明且尊重的方式傳達獎金回饋。

all.en: All policy documents have been translated into seven languages to ensure equitable access for our global workforce.
all.zh: 所有政策文件已翻譯為七種語言，以確保全球員工皆能公平取得。

all.en: Annual benchmarking studies will continue to inform future revisions of the bonus policy, keeping our practices competitive and modern.
all.zh: 未來獎金辦法的修訂仍將參考年度標竿研究，使本公司做法具備市場競爭力且與時俱進。

all.en: We invite employees to share suggestions for further enhancements through the dedicated feedback channel monitored by the rewards team.
all.zh: 歡迎員工透過獎酬團隊專責管理的回饋管道，提出後續優化建議。

all.en: Together, we look forward to celebrating a successful year and recognizing the meaningful contributions that drive our shared progress.
all.zh: 讓我們共同期待豐收的一年，並表彰推動共同進展的每一份具有意義的貢獻。

all.en: Honestly, the first time I read the new policy I needed a coffee and a quiet hour just to absorb the three-component structure properly.
all.zh: 老實說，第一次讀新辦法時，我得泡杯咖啡，找個安靜的一小時才能好好消化那三個組成部分的結構。

all.en: My manager scheduled a fifteen-minute coffee chat just to walk me through how the weighting affects my role, and that small conversation made everything click.
all.zh: 我主管特地安排了十五分鐘的咖啡聊聊，帶我了解權重如何影響我的職位，那段小對話讓我所有問題瞬間清楚了。

all.en: If you're a parent who took leave this year, please double-check the parental leave section, because the new wording really does protect your evaluation outcome.
all.zh: 如果你是今年請過育嬰假的家長，請仔細看育嬰假那一段，新的條文用詞真的會保護你的評估結果。

all.en: I plan to use part of my bonus this year to finally fix the leaky kitchen faucet that has been driving my wife absolutely crazy for the past six months.
all.zh: 我打算今年用一部分獎金，終於把廚房那個漏水的水龍頭修好，這六個月來真的把我太太逼瘋了。

all.en: A colleague nominated me for the special recognition bonus last quarter without telling me, and honestly that meant more to me than the money itself.
all.zh: 上一季有同事在沒告訴我的情況下提名我特別表揚獎金，老實說那份心意對我來說比獎金本身更重要。

all.en: If you've never attended an information session before, please go to one this April, because the live questions usually surface scenarios you didn't even know to ask about.
all.zh: 如果你以前從沒參加過說明會，今年四月請務必去一場，因為現場提問通常會帶出連你自己都沒想到要問的情境。

all.en: Please don't ignore the dashboard on the people analytics portal, because checking it every quarter beats discovering a surprise during your year-end review.
all.zh: 請別忽視人力分析入口網站上的儀表板，每季去看一次絕對勝過在年終評估時才發現意外。

all.en: My favorite small change is that nominations for special recognition can happen anytime, because honestly the moments worth recognizing rarely fit neatly inside a fiscal quarter.
all.zh: 我最喜歡的小改變是特別表揚的提名隨時可以提出，因為老實說，值得被肯定的時刻很少剛好落在某個會計季度內。

all.en: If you're feeling nervous about your upcoming bonus conversation, please remember managers also received fresh training this year, so the dialogue should feel less awkward than before.
all.zh: 如果你對即將到來的獎金面談感到緊張，請記得今年主管們也接受了新訓練，這次對話應該會比以前自然許多。

all.en: Honestly, whatever your bonus ends up being, please take a moment to celebrate the year you put in, because the work itself deserves to be acknowledged first.
all.zh: 老實說，不管你最後拿到多少獎金，請花點時間慶祝這一年你的投入，因為工作本身才是最值得被肯定的部分。
